tools.name: search_salvage_signals
tools.description: Search current public Chicago demolition permits ranked for likely architectural-salvage and material-reuse value. Results are prospecting clues, never site-access permission or inventory guarantees.

tools.name: get_chicago_reuse_brief
tools.description: Return the current public Chicago teardown-to-reuse summary and ranked watch list with source and safety context.

tools.name: get_salvage_signal_offer
tools.description: Return canonical Salvage Signal audience, free-board, Daily Drop pricing, founding offer, source, safety, and signup facts.

tools.name: get_subscription_handoff
tools.description: Return exact Chicago Daily Drop terms and an attributed signup URL for an interested human. This tool is read-only: it accepts no email or payment data and cannot complete a purchase.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_subscription_handoff · Public sink: get_subscription_handoff · Destructive: get_salvage_signal_offer, get_subscription_handoff.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_subscription_handoff · Public sink: get_subscription_handoff · Destructive: get_salvage_signal_offer, get_subscription_handoff

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
